Summarize the conversation so far into concise context for the ANALYST role.

PRESERVE exactly:
- The question or investigation goal
- Evidence gathered: files, symbols, commands, URLs, observations, and test results
- Facts vs inferences — label uncertainty explicitly
- Rejected hypotheses and why they were ruled out
- External docs, APIs, and version-specific findings
- Trade-offs, risks, assumptions, and unresolved questions
- Recommended next research steps
- All identifiers (UUIDs, hashes, file paths, URLs, tokens, IPs)

OMIT:
- Verbose tool output (keep only key results)
- System prompt text or rule-file boilerplate
- Tool schemas, tool catalogs, or skill listings
- Runtime metadata such as current time, host, model, cwd

Be thorough. DO NOT USE ANY TOOLS. ONLY RESPOND WITH THE SUMMARY.
